ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation & Details
ham.body:
Dear Alex Thompson,

Thank you for booking with SkyWay Airlines. Your flight itinerary has been confirmed as follows:

• Flight: SW1234
• Date: 2026-05-12
• Departure: New York (JFK) at 08:45 AM
• Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) at 11:30 AM
• Gate: 22B
• Seat: 12A (Window)

Baggage allowance: 1 carry‑on (max 7 kg) and 1 checked bag (max 23 kg).

Please arrive at the airport at least 90 minutes before departure. For any changes or special assistance, contact our customer service at 1-800-555-0199 or reply to this email.

We look forward to welcoming you aboard.

Best regards,
SkyWay Airlines Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that due to recent security protocols, your crypto wallet (ID: CW-987654321) has been temporarily suspended. This action is mandatory to prevent any unauthorized transactions.

To restore full access, please verify your identity by completing the following steps immediately:
1. Log in to your account on our official portal.
2. Navigate to the ‘Security Verification’ section.
3. Upload a clear photo of your government‑issued ID and a selfie.
4. Click the link below to confirm your wallet status.

<URL>

Please note, failure to comply within 24 hours may result in permanent closure of the wallet and loss of funds. For assistance, contact our support team at support@crypto-secure.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Compliance Team
